about.title: About Me
about.text1: Hi, I'm Biel Vereda — the guy who spends more time between lines of code than away from the screen. Curious by nature, I've always liked to understand how things work, and that's how I fell in love with programming.
about.text2: Today I work with Front-end and Back-end, creating projects that range from simple websites to complete systems. I like to give everything a modern, fluid touch with a personal style.
about.text3: In the future, I want to keep growing as a Full Stack developer and join big projects where I can learn even more and show that well-written code can also have style.
